# CasinosAPI

> AI-optimized casino bonus data API with natural language search

## API Overview

CasinosAPI provides structured casino bonus data designed for AI assistants. All endpoints return JSON with AI-friendly summaries and relevance scoring.

Base URL: https://casinosapi.com/api
Authentication: X-API-Key header or ?key= query parameter
Default key: grokcasino-api-key-2026-02-24-abcdef123456
Rate limit: 100 requests/minute

## Endpoints

### GET /search

Natural language search for casino bonuses. This is the primary endpoint.

Parameters:
- q (required): Natural language query
- location (optional): ISO country code (FI, SE, DE, etc.)
- limit (optional): Max results, default 20

Examples:
- /search?q=200% bonus
- /search?q=no wagering spins&location=FI
- /search?q=under €500 with 100 spins

Response includes relevance_score, match_reasons, and parsed query parameters.

### GET /casino

Get detailed information about a specific casino.

Parameters:
- slug: Casino slug (e.g., "cazeus-casino")
- name: Casino name for partial matching

### GET /compare

Compare multiple casinos side-by-side.

Parameters:
- casinos: Comma-separated slugs

Returns ai_recommendation and quick_pick options.

### GET /bonus

List all bonuses for a location.

Parameters:
- location (required): ISO country code

### GET /health

Health check. No authentication required.

## Data Schema

Each casino includes:
- casino_name, slug, bonus
- bonus_structure: {percentage, max_amount, free_spins}
- wagering: {bonus, free_spins}
- verification: {status, confidence, last_verified}
- trust: {score, warnings}
- ai_summary: Pre-computed natural language description

## Best Practices

- Use /search for any user question about bonuses
- Check verification.confidence before recommending
- Mention trust.warnings if trust.score < 7
- Use /compare when user asks "which is better"
- Filter by location for legal compliance

## Contact

admin@casinosapi.com
